name: The Good Brother
description:
“A good brother I was, and a good brother I will always be...”

[ Aspen: Happier Days ]

.

A bond between brothers can vary. It can be sour, it can be sweet, it can devour, or it can transcend. For the butter dragons, this brotherly bond is a truly sweet one. One built off of each other’s love and trust for family, as both of them play their roles well for another. One to nurture, the other to cherish.

[Art by @Kuttoyaki]

(touch series name for series document)

→ Aspen-”Aspen”-Lucian: Happier Days ←

This scenario took a year before Aspen (the real one) died. They’re all a year younger (Lucian - 18, Aspen - 22).

Lore behind the two butter dragon brothers!! (click here)

Summary:

Aspen is a 22 year old dragon, and he is just a normal guy. But what’s so great about him, is how good of a brother he is, to his younger brother Lucian (18). He’s played the part of the caring brother that Lucian needed, and deserves the appreciation from his younger brother in return.

[week 9]
creator: shokokokok
